name: Dangerous line
short_description: You are a hero who faces waves of enemies who are trying to get into your kingdom and seize power in it.
detailed_description:
You are a hero who faces waves of enemies who are trying to get into your kingdom and seize power in it. On your side are three heroes who are ready to fight to the end. Each of them has their own characteristics and starting weapons. By defeating enemies, you will gain experience, for which you can choose one of three random weapons. Enemies come in waves, and there are different types. Be careful and you will be able to stop the villains.

  • Dynamic gameplay

  • Many enemies

  • Beautiful graphics
